# clerk_allowlist_identifier (Resource)

Manages a Clerk allowlist identifier. Allowlist identifiers restrict sign-ups to specific email addresses, phone numbers, or domains.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identifier` (String) The identifier to allowlist (e.g. "@aretecp.com" for a domain, or a specific email address).

### Optional

- `notify` (Boolean) Whether to send an invitation email to the identifier. Only applicable for email addresses.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the allowlist entry was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the allowlist entry.
- `identifier_type` (String) Type of the identifier: email_address, phone_number, domain, or web3_wallet.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the allowlist entry was last updated.
